flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of West Georgia fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (8.6k → 7.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of West Georgia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of West Georgia rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (21.7% → 24.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of West Georgia rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (68.7% → 77.5%).
